scripts.build: bun build src/plugin.ts --outdir dist --target node --external '@elizaos/core' --external '@elizaos/plugin-openai' --external '@elizaos/plugin-bootstrap' --external '@elizaos/plugin-anthropic' && bun build src/server.ts --outfile dist/server.js --target node --external '@elizaos/core' && bun build src/llm-proxy.ts --outfile dist/llm-proxy.js --target node
